walking.route: NW 23rd Ave to Burnside St to SW 3rd Ave to downtown

bicycling.route: Protected bike lane on NW 23rd Ave to Burnside to downtown

driving.route: NW 23rd to Burnside to I405 to downtown (moderate congestion)

streetcar.route: NS Line from NW 23rd & Marshall to PSU / downtown

bus.route: Bus 8989 from NW 23rd & Marshall to downtown

bike_lanes: Protected cycle track on NW 21st Street (one block north)
Protected cycle track on NW 18th Street (three blocks north)
Bike lane on NW 23rd Ave connecting to downtown

items.name: Nob Hill Nature Park
items.note: Located in the Nob Hill enclave, accessible via NW Northrup Street

items.name: Pocket parks - NW Lovejoy corridor
items.note: Several small pocket parks along NW Lovejoy between 20th and 24th

items.name: Pocket parks - NW Northrup Street
items.note: Green spaces interspersed among residential blocks on NW Northrup

items.name: Chapman Elementary School grounds
items.note: Famous annual chimney swift roosting event each September; ~1.2km away

neighborhood_character.vibe: Historic NW 23rd Avenue commercial corridor featuring independent shops, diverse restaurants, and Portland's signature porch culture
neighborhood_character.historic_significance: Part of Portland's Nob Hill (Homestead) neighborhood - one of the city's earliest developed residential areas, established in the late 19th century
neighborhood_character.heritage_tree: Portland Heritage Tree #10 on NW 23rd Avenue
neighborhood_character.architecture: Mix of early 20th-century craftsman/bungalow homes on hilltops and 1950s-60s commercial buildings in the corridor
neighborhood_character.housing_style: Victorian and Craftsman houses dominate the upper residential blocks; apartments and mixed-use buildings along the commercial corridor

vauxs_swifts.description: Chimney swifts gather at Chapman Elementary School chimney each September
vauxs_swifts.best_time: Late August to mid-September at dusk
vauxs_swifts.note: One of the largest known migratory chimney swift roosts in the Pacific Northwest

seasonal_notes.street_trees: Street trees provide canopy coverage along NW 23rd Avenue and cross streets; deciduous species provide summer shade and winter sun
seasonal_notes.winter_considerations: Nob Hill is on a hill - snow and ice can accumulate on NW 23rd Avenue; street parking may require snow tires in winter

parking_detail.within_1km: No dedicated parking facilities (lots or garages) within 1km radius

nearby_options.location: NW 23rd Avenue curbside; NW Northrup Street

nearby_options.name: Multi-storey parking
nearby_options.location: PMC lot at 1313 W Burnside St

parking_detail.note: Living in Nob Hill typically means street parking; the area is residential but centrally located with commercial availability on Burnside

data_verification.verified_by: Live neighborhood analysis via OSM tools (geocoding, area exploration, nearby places, transport routing)
data_verification.supplementary_analysis: Walking/driving/biking commute times computed via OSRM; park and transit details verified through area exploration and pedestrian routing
